poll.question: The puppy curls between Jade, Marcus, and Ryan. Keeping it means they commit to staying—to being needed every single day. Does Jade say yes?

options.label: Yes, keep it
options.desc: Love means choosing to be needed, even if it's terrifying

options.label: No, let it go
options.desc: She's still learning to believe they'll stay for her

in_play.label: Openly tender
in_play.desc: Their love is real; watching it is how Ryan learns he's still held.
